sentence: 这里的水质非常好，可以直接饮用。
pinyin: Zhèlǐ de shuǐzhì fēicháng hǎo, kěyǐ zhíjiē yǐnyòng.
english: The water quality here is excellent and can be drunk directly.

sentence: 这家集团在海外设有多家子公司。
pinyin: Zhè jiā jítuán zài hǎiwài shè yǒu duō jiā zǐgōngsī.
english: This conglomerate has several subsidiary companies overseas.

sentence: 这是一本专为幼女设计的绘本。
pinyin: Zhè shì yī běn zhuān wèi yòunǚ shèjì de huìběn.
english: This is a picture book designed specifically for young girls.

sentence: 这座古桥始建于明朝。
pinyin: Zhè zuò gǔqiáo shǐjiàn yú Míng cháo.
english: This ancient bridge started construction during the Ming Dynasty.

meaning: 1. network router; 2. gateway (to Internet or between networks)
sentence: 网关出了问题，导致断网。
pinyin: Wǎngguān chū le wèntí, dǎozhì duàn wǎng.
english: There was a problem with the gateway, causing the network to go down.

sentence: 这部电影由知名导演亲自执导。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng yóu zhīmíng dǎoyǎn qīnzì zhídǎo.
english: This film was personally directed by a well-known director.

sentence: 警方逮捕了一名恐怖分子。
pinyin: Jǐngfāng dàibǔ le yī míng kǒngbù fènzǐ.
english: The police arrested a terrorist.

sentence: 所有参与者都收到了一份礼物。
pinyin: Suǒyǒu cānyùzhě dōu shōudào le yī fèn lǐwù.
english: All participants received a gift.

meaning: 1. to be deeply concerned; 2. to be troubled (by)
sentence: 妈妈很关切我的健康状况。
pinyin: Māma hěn guānqiē wǒ de jiànkāng zhuàngkuàng.
english: Mom is very concerned about my health.

meaning: 1. to declassify; 2. (computing) to decrypt; 3. to decipher
sentence: 他花了一个小时才解密文件。
pinyin: Tā huā le yī gè xiǎoshí cái jiěmì wénjiàn.
english: It took him an hour to decrypt the file.

sentence: 这首歌最近大热，到处都在播。
pinyin: Zhè shǒu gē zuìjìn dàrè, dàochù dōu zài bō.
english: This song is really popular lately — it's playing everywhere.

sentence: 这款新药对患者来说真是福音。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn xīn yào duì huànzhě lái shuō zhēn shì fúyīn.
english: This new medicine is truly good news for patients.

sentence: 他很大度，没有计较那件事。
pinyin: Tā hěn dàdù, méiyǒu jìjiào nà jiàn shì.
english: He was very magnanimous and didn't make a fuss about the matter.

sentence: 这碗米饭大约有两百大卡。
pinyin: Zhè wǎn mǐfàn dàyuē yǒu liǎng bǎi dàkǎ.
english: This bowl of rice has about 200 kilocalories.

sentence: 整个设计缺乏统一性。
pinyin: Zhěnggè shèjì quēfá tǒngyīxìng.
english: The overall design lacks unity.

sentence: 性教育课讲到了性交的相关知识。
pinyin: Xìngjiàoyù kè jiǎng dào le xìngjiāo de xiāngguān zhīshi.
english: The sex education class covered knowledge related to sexual intercourse.

sentence: 古人的智慧让今人也叹为观止。
pinyin: Gǔ rén de zhì huì ràng jīn rén yě tàn wéi guān zhǐ.
english: The wisdom of the ancients still amazes people today.

sentence: 昨天我们去吃了一碗云南米线。
pinyin: Zuó tiān wǒ men qù chī le yī wǎn Yún nán mǐ xiàn.
english: Yesterday we went and had a bowl of Yunnan rice noodles.

meaning: bandit; brigand; gambling chip; chamber pot; (slang) girl; chick; babe
sentence: 他带着马子一起去逛街了。
pinyin: Tā dài zhe mǎ zi yī qǐ qù guàng jiē le.
english: He took his girl out shopping.

sentence: 这场演唱会的票价太贵了。
pinyin: Zhè chǎng yǎnchànghuì de piàojià tài guì le.
english: The ticket price for this concert is way too expensive.

meaning: 1. to surround; 2. to circle; 3. to revolve around
sentence: 小村子被青山环绕，风景很美。
pinyin: Xiǎo cūnzi bèi qīngshān huánrào, fēngjǐng hěn měi.
english: The little village is surrounded by green hills — the scenery is beautiful.

sentence: 这座桥是一位年轻建筑师设计的。
pinyin: Zhè zuò qiáo shì yī wèi niánqīng jiànzhùshī shèjì de.
english: This bridge was designed by a young architect.

sentence: 她把旅行的相片都打印出来了。
pinyin: Tā bǎ lǚxíng de xiāngpiàn dōu dǎyìn chūlái le.
english: She printed out all the photos from her trip.

sentence: 演出结束后掌声不断。
pinyin: Yǎnchū jiéshù hòu zhǎngshēng bùduàn.
english: Applause kept going after the performance ended.

meaning: 1. pirated; 2. illegal; 3. see also 正版[zhèng bǎn]
sentence: 买盗版软件存在很大的安全风险。
pinyin: Mǎi dàobǎn ruǎnjiàn cúnzài hěn dà de ānquán fēngxiǎn.
english: Buying pirated software carries serious security risks.

meaning: 1. to offer sacrifices to the gods or ancestors
sentence: 每年春节前，奶奶都会祭祀祖先。
pinyin: Měi nián Chūnjié qián, nǎinai dōu huì jìsì zǔxiān.
english: Every year before the Spring Festival, grandma offers sacrifices to the ancestors.

sentence: 她荣获了最佳设计师的头衔。
pinyin: Tā róng huò le zuì jiā shè jì shī de tóu xián.
english: She was honored with the title of Best Designer.

meaning: 1. to place an order; 2. to subscribe
sentence: 我在网上订购了一箱苹果。
pinyin: Wǒ zài wǎng shàng dìng gòu le yī xiāng píngguǒ.
english: I ordered a box of apples online.

meaning: 1. to remove sb from their post; 2. to dismiss
sentence: 董事会决定罢免这位总经理。
pinyin: Dǒng shì huì jué dìng bà miǎn zhè wèi zǒng jīng lǐ.
english: The board of directors decided to dismiss the general manager.

sentence: 这笔钱来自纳税人的口袋。
pinyin: Zhè bǐ qián lái zì nà shuì rén de kǒu dai.
english: This money comes out of taxpayers' pockets.

sentence: 他对物理学非常感兴趣。
pinyin: Tā duì wùlǐxué fēicháng gǎn xìngqù.
english: He is very interested in physics.

sentence: 我们在最近的地铁站见面吧。
pinyin: Wǒmen zài zuìjìn de dìtiězhàn jiànmiàn ba.
english: Let's meet at the nearest subway station.

sentence: 快递员拿起包裹开始称重。
pinyin: Kuàidìyuán ná qǐ bāoguǒ kāishǐ chēngzhòng.
english: The courier picked up the package and began weighing it.

sentence: 政府正在努力打击贪腐现象。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ zhèngzài nǔlì dǎjī tānfǔ xiànxiàng.
english: The government is working hard to combat corruption.

sentence: 学校选送她去参加全国比赛。
pinyin: Xuéxiào xuǎnsòng tā qù cānjiā quánguó bǐsài.
english: The school selected and sent her to compete in the national competition.

sentence: 书后附有作者的小传。
pinyin: Shū hòu fù yǒu zuòzhě de xiǎozhuàn.
english: At the back of the book there is a brief biography of the author.

sentence: 公司正在推进业务国际化。
pinyin: Gōngsī zhèngzài tuījìn yèwù guójìhuà.
english: The company is pushing forward with internationalizing its business.

sentence: 计算机每秒可以完成数十亿次运算。
pinyin: Jìsuànjī měi miǎo kěyǐ wánchéng shù shí yì cì yùnsuàn.
english: A computer can perform billions of operations per second.

sentence: 这类商品的税率是百分之十三。
pinyin: Zhè lèi shāngpǐn de shuìlǜ shì bǎifēnzhī shísān.
english: The tax rate for this type of goods is thirteen percent.

sentence: 他花了一周时间绘制这张地图。
pinyin: Tā huā le yī zhōu shíjiān huìzhì zhè zhāng dìtú.
english: He spent a week drafting this map.

meaning: 1. to retrieve (data); 2. to look up; 3. retrieval; 4. search
sentence: 你可以在数据库里检索这篇论文。
pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ zài shùjùkù lǐ jiǎnsuǒ zhè piān lùnwén.
english: You can retrieve this paper from the database.

sentence: 她在表格上填了已婚。
pinyin: Tā zài biǎogé shàng tián le yǐhūn.
english: She wrote 'married' on the form.

sentence: 他考上了北京的一所医学院。
pinyin: Tā kǎo shàng le Běijīng de yī suǒ yīxuéyuàn.
english: He got into a medical school in Beijing.

sentence: 这项改革受到了利益集团的阻挠。
pinyin: Zhè xiàng gǎigé shòudào le lìyì jítuán de zǔnáo.
english: This reform was obstructed by interest groups.

sentence: 我们周末去影院看新片吧。
pinyin: Wǒmen zhōumò qù yǐngyuàn kàn xīn piàn ba.
english: Let's go to the cinema to watch the new film this weekend.

meaning: 1. cannot help; 2. to be beyond control of
sentence: 这件事由不得你自己决定。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn shì yóu bu dé nǐ zìjǐ juédìng.
english: This matter is not yours to decide on your own.

sentence: 她在大学主修动物学。
pinyin: Tā zài dàxué zhǔxiū dòngwùxué.
english: She majored in zoology at university.

sentence: 我想特别感谢所有帮助过我的人。
pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng tèbié gǎnxiè suǒyǒu bāngzhù guò wǒ de rén.
english: I'd like to give special thanks to everyone who has helped me.

sentence: 比赛上半结束时比分是一比零。
pinyin: Bǐsài shàngbàn jiéshù shí bǐfēn shì yī bǐ líng.
english: The score was one to zero at the end of the first half.

meaning: to put into production; to put into operation
sentence: 新工厂预计明年初正式投产。
pinyin: Xīn gōng chǎng yù jì míng nián chū zhèng shì tóu chǎn.
english: The new factory is expected to officially go into production early next year.
